ddls:
CREATE TABLE "testing_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the testing method (e.g., Unit Testing, Integration Testing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the testing method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the testing method was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the testing method was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the testing method is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing method being analyzed */,
  "branch_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of branch coverage achieved */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity score */,
  "npath_complexity" INTEGER /* NPath complexity score */,
  "sequence_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of sequence coverage achieved */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were recorded */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test was conducted */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the test metrics */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the latest version of the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_metrics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES testing_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metrics associated with the test run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was executed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test run in seconds */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test run (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test run was conducted */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the test run */,
  "test_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test run */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES test_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated test run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue encountered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., Open, Resolved, Closed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to resolve the issue */,
  "issue_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue */,
  "issue_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "issue_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Tester, Developer, Manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test plan */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the test plan */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the testing method used in the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the test plan */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test plan was created */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the test plan is executed */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "test_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test plan */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the test plan */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the test plan is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_plans_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES testing_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who manages the project */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_coverage" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the coverage */,
  "branch_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of branch coverage achieved */,
  "sequence_coverage" TEXT /* Percentage of sequence coverage achieved */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the coverage was measured */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the coverage metrics */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the latest version of the coverage metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_coverage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the coverage report */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the report was generated */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the coverage report */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the report */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if this is the latest version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metrics being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version entry */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the metrics were versioned */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the software being tested */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes related to the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES test_metrics ("metric_id")
)
